function.name: set_brightness
function.description: Set the lamp brightness as a percentage from 0 (off) to 100 (max).

function.name: set_label
function.description: Set the short text label shown on the lamp's display.

function.name: reboot
function.description: Restart the lamp. Admin-only; do not call unless explicitly authorized.
